profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Enjoying reflection and learning, I started getting into programming in late 2022, alongside my professional activity. Eager to make it my career, I completed a bootcamp in early 2024, then continued to develop my skills, first alongside my position in metrology, then full-time, while looking for an internship or apprenticeship.

skills.title: Transferable skills:
items: Create VBA macros for various applications
Connect to datasets and modify them with Power Query
Create Power BI desktop reports and deploy them on the web service
Conduct statistical studies (expert in uncertainty calculations)

items.title: Interactive map powered by OpenStreetMap data

descriptions.title: Android application that allows to:
items: Reposition on a map based on the indicated location
Display points of interest around this location on the map
Click on a point of interest to display its information

descriptions.title: Python application for Windows that allows to:
items: Store all this information in a database

items.title: A TikTok-style interactive feed to discover music clips

descriptions.title: Android and iOS application that allows to:
items: Authenticate to access the rest of the application
Select musical genres that interest us
Scroll to listen to random music clips
Swipe to save as favorites or delete the clip
Explore favorites to listen to full songs
